libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property setup is indicated. Prefer in-memory coverage of DAV XML/property/method/request/response classes and lightweight servlet request/response stubs rather than requiring a real WebDAV server, servlet container, or Jackrabbit repository.

deterministic_setup.reason:
The artifact's POM declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as provided, while key public classes such as AbstractWebdavServlet, WebdavRequestImpl, InputContextImpl, and OutputContextImpl depend on javax.servlet/http types. input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Without the Servlet API dependency, tests that exercise servlet-facing APIs will not compile even though the main artifact resolves successfully.
A full servlet-container integration test would require additional infrastructure, but it is not necessary for meaningful reachability coverage of this library.
The reported native-image failure appears tied to runtime behavior/metadata in existing locator tests, not to missing Docker or environment setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful servlet-side WebDAV coverage needs the Servlet API on the test classpath because jackrabbit-webdav declares it as a provided dependency and exposes it in public APIs.
